funds_data.description: The fund generally invests at least 90% of its total assets in securities that comprise the underlying index. The underlying index is a custom index comprised of companies that the index provider has determined focus on offering products or services that contribute to a more environmentally sustainable economy by making a more efficient use of limited global natural resources.
